paper_focus.title: Lightweight Fe–Mn–Al–C Steels: Current State, Manufacturing, and Implementation Prospects
paper_focus.research_objective: To summarize the current state of knowledge on composition–processing–property relationships in lightweight Fe–Mn–Al–C steels and identify research gaps that must be addressed for their practical industrial application.
material_systems: reference materials: rolled homogeneous armor (RHA), high-strength low-alloy (HSLA) steel, titanium-based armor alloys
main_process_variables: Alloy composition (Mn, Al, C, Si, Cr, Cu, V, Nb, Mo, Ni)
